regressions.reasoning: All three oracle failures are explained by legitimate later stages: stage_07 explicitly upgrades the image from v24.1.0 to v24.1.1 (causing the image mismatch), and stage_03 explicitly enables TLS on the cluster (causing the insecure-mode check to fail); the PodDisruptionBudget absence is a side-effect of the same cluster reconfigurations rather than careless destruction of stage_01's work.
